tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Tove Lo
Song Title: Habits
Album: released as single (2013)
Tabbed by ashleyfoo
Email : ashleyfoo95@live.com

Feel free to comment and rate =)

Based on:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fG-EIvEiSHs

Standard tuning
Chords: [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]

Capo on 1st fret


[Verse]

If anything I'm restless[/tab]
